summary: Supply, fabrication and installation of aluminium windows and unitised curtain walling to the Harbour Crest Residences tower, including performance testing and structural glazing certification.

notes.text: Supply and installation of aluminium windows and unitised curtain-wall panels to all elevations.
Air and water penetration testing of the curtain-wall mock-up.
Builder's work in connection (openings, making good) by others.
Permanent power and water for testing to be provided by the main contractor.
Slab-edge tolerances are not stated; bracketry allowance assumes ±15mm.
The specification calls for 6mm glass while the drawings note 8mm at podium level.
Continuous crane access to the facade is available during the installation window.

clarifying_questions: Confirm the glass thickness at podium level (spec vs drawings).
Confirm who provides temporary power and water for on-site testing.
Confirm the programme handover dates for facade access.
